insight.headline: Market-driven shipping
insight.what_changed: The GraphQL Admin API now supports market-driven shipping configuration, allowing apps to configure shipping directly on a market. This change helps apps support different shipping settings for various markets. The market-driven shipping model replaces the legacy delivery profiles.
insight.developer_impact: Developers should update their apps to use the new market-driven shipping configuration. They can use the GraphQL Admin API to configure shipping options for each market and vary rates by province or region. This change may require significant updates to existing shipping logic. Developers should review the market-driven shipping documentation and update their code to use the new APIs.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants will be able to configure shipping options directly on each market, giving them more control over their shipping settings. This change will allow merchants to offer more flexible shipping options to their customers.
insight.why_it_matters: Market-driven shipping is a significant change that allows for more flexible and customized shipping options. It's essential for developers to update their apps to support this new model to provide the best experience for merchants and customers.

also_worth_knowing.text: OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill

updates.title: Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision
updates.summary: Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision, allowing for sub-region markets in the Admin GraphQL API 2026-07. This enables apps to handle markets configured with country-subdivision regions.

updates.title: OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill
updates.summary: OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill as of API version 2026-10. This change affects apps using the Admin GraphQL API.

updates.title: Shop Minis May June 2026 update
updates.summary: Shop Minis May June 2026 update introduces new features, including typed product variant intent hooks for selecting variants and adding variants to cart. The React SDK has been updated with useSelectVariant and other hooks.

updates.title: Market-driven shipping now available in feature preview
updates.summary: Market-driven shipping is now available in feature preview, allowing merchants to attach shipping options directly to each market and vary rates by product or location.

updates.title: @shopify/mini-oxygen@4.2.0
updates.summary: @shopify/mini-oxygen@4.2.0 makes the Oxygen Vite plugin self-sufficient by inferring a compatibility date from the resolved Hydrogen package when one is not provided.

updates.title: @shopify/cli-hydrogen@13.0.0
updates.summary: @shopify/cli-hydrogen@13.0.0 adds deploy flags and environment variables for configuring Oxygen's client assets directory and worker directory.

updates.title: Draft order deposit fields are now available in the GraphQL Admin API and Customer Account API
updates.summary: Draft order deposit fields are now available in the GraphQL Admin API and Customer Account API as of the 2026-07 API version. Apps can set a deposit when creating or updating a draft order.

updates.title: Deprecation of cumulative marketing engagements
updates.summary: The isCumulative argument to the marketingEngagementCreate mutation is being deprecated, defaulting to false. Integrations should be updated to send non-cumulative engagements.

updates.title: New `lineItem` field on the `GiftCard` object
updates.summary: The GraphQL Admin API's GiftCard object now includes a lineItem field, representing the LineItem from the order that initiated the gift card's creation.

updates.title: Discount application information now available for draft orders on the Customer Account API
updates.summary: Discount application information is now available for draft orders on the Customer Account API as of GraphQL Customer Account API version 2026-07.

updates.title: `discountedUnitPrice` on `DraftOrderLineItem` Customer Account API deprecation
updates.summary: The discountedUnitPrice field on the DraftOrderLineItem object in the Customer Account API is now deprecated. Use approximateDiscountedUnitPrice instead.

updates.title: `BusinessEntity` now exposes `legalEntityId` in the GraphQL Admin API
updates.summary: The BusinessEntity type in the GraphQL Admin API now includes a new legalEntityId field, which returns the stable Central Legal Entity ID from Shopify's Organizations Platform.

recap.headline: Shopify updates GraphQL Admin API, Hydrogen, and more

themes.title: GraphQL Admin API updates
themes.detail: The GraphQL Admin API now supports MarketRegionSubdivision, OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill, and draft order deposit fields are available. Additionally, the GiftCard object includes a lineItem field, and the BusinessEntity type exposes a legalEntityId field. The discountedUnitPrice field on DraftOrderLineItem is deprecated in favor…

themes.title: Hydrogen updates
themes.detail: Hydrogen now deploys to Vercel, and the @shopify/mini-oxygen package is updated to version 4.2.0. The @shopify/cli-hydrogen package is updated to version 13.0.0 with deploy flags and environment variables for configuring Oxygen's client assets directory and worker directory.

themes.title: Market-driven shipping and deprecations
themes.detail: Market-driven shipping is now available in feature preview, and merchant-owned delivery profile APIs are deprecated. The isCumulative argument to the marketingEngagementCreate mutation is also being deprecated, defaulting to false.

actions.text: Update integrations to use non-cumulative marketing engagements
Replace deprecated discountedUnitPrice field with approximateDiscountedUnitPrice
